intro: Drive at full speed, pick up passengers, and compete for the top spot in a fast-paced futuristic taxi arcade.
description:
Taxi Hyperdrive is a fast-paced arcade game built around quick 10-minute sessions. Take control of a futuristic hovering taxi and race through a massive open city, picking up passengers and delivering them to their destinations before time runs out.

Explore a futuristic metropolis made up of multiple themed districts, each with its own visual identity: advanced urban areas, wild west–inspired zones, Egyptian-style regions, and Asian-themed districts. Every area offers unique routes, shortcuts, and opportunities to maximize your earnings.

Your taxi moves at extreme speed and can perform massive jumps across the city. Scattered throughout the map are power-ups that boost your income, adding a strong strategic layer. Choosing the right passenger order, routes, and power-ups is key to achieving high scores.

At the end of each run, your earned money is uploaded to a global online leaderboard, allowing you to compete with players worldwide and see who can earn the most in a single session.

Taxi Hyperdrive delivers an accessible yet chaotic and addictive arcade experience, designed for short but intense play sessions, with a strong focus on competition and skill mastery.

Features:
• Intense 10-minute arcade sessions.
• Large futuristic open city with multiple themed districts.
• High-speed driving with hovering taxis and extreme jumps.
• Power-ups that add strategy and competitive depth.
• Global online leaderboard to compete for top scores.
• 6 training missions to learn and master the mechanics.

Time is ticking, passengers are waiting, and the leaderboard shows no mercy.
